section_miscategorizations.text: He has gallstones and takes pepcid for it.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past medical history and a chronic medication rather than directly related to the acute arm injury; in a more granular template it would belong in a Past Medical History/Medications section, but within this simplified template its placement in HPI is acceptable and not misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: He had a lumbar fusion six years ago.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is remote surgical history rather than part of the current illness; ideally it would be in a Past Surgical History section, but given the available sections it does not substantially distort the meaning of the HPI.
